# PlainInfluence

> Follow the money. Campaign donations, lobbying, and federal contracts in one place.

PlainInfluence combines three federal data sources to show the full picture of political influence in the United States.

## Coverage
- 7,124 politicians who received PAC contributions (FEC 2024 cycle)
- 9,940 organizations linked across FEC, Senate LDA, and USAspending
- 79 lobbying issue areas from healthcare to defense
- 56 states and territories with aggregated data
- Entity resolution links organizations across all three databases

## Data Sources
- Federal Election Commission (FEC) — 2024 election cycle bulk data
- Senate Lobbying Disclosure Act (LDA) — 2023-2024 filings
- USAspending.gov — Federal contract awards (FPDS)

## Key Pages
- /politicians/ — Browse politicians by total received
- /politician/{fec-id} — Individual politician profile with top donors
- /organizations/ — Browse organizations by total influence
- /organization/{id} — Organization profile with contributions, lobbying, contracts
- /issues/ — All lobbying issues by spending
- /issue/{code} — Issue detail with top spenders
- /states/ — Political money by state
- /state/{abbr} — State detail with politicians and organizations
- /rankings/ — Pre-computed rankings across all categories
- /search?q= — Search politicians and organizations

## Methodology
Entity resolution links the same organization across FEC (PAC committees), Senate LDA (lobbying registrants), and USAspending (contractors) using canonical name matching.
Total influence = contributions + lobbying spending + contract awards.

## Site
- URL: https://plaininfluence.com
- Publisher: Kiznis.Studio
- License: Public domain data, original design copyrighted
